results.title: The Top Study Habits to Improve Learning | Dr. Andrew Huberman
results.reason: The gold standard for evidence-based study habits; it explains the 'why' behind learning protocols perfectly for a student audience.
summary: Learn how to focus better while studying
Discover the best times to take breaks
Use short tests to remember information longer
Improve your memory with better sleep habits

results.title: How To Create A Podcast for Beginners
results.reason: Highly structured tutorial for students interested in starting their own podcast, offering clear step-by-step instructions.
summary: Pick the right equipment for your budget
Choose a topic that people want to hear
Record and edit your first high quality episode
Share your show on all major platforms

results.title: One of the Greatest Speeches Ever | Steve Jobs
results.reason: A classic inspirational resource that is highly accessible for beginners, though it functions more as a motivational speech than a tactical guide.
summary: Trust that life events will connect later
Find work that you truly love doing
Use your limited time to follow your heart
Stay curious and keep looking for new ideas

results.title: Jordan Peterson's Ultimate Advice for Students and College Grads - STOP WASTING TIME
results.reason: Directly addresses the student demographic with actionable advice on time management and personal responsibility.
summary: Stop wasting hours on things that do not matter
Set clear goals to give your life direction
Take responsibility for your own future success
Build a daily routine that keeps you productive

results.title: Billionaire’s Brain vs Your Brain: Morning Routine, Focus & Addiction | Dr Sweta | FO403 Raj Shamani
results.reason: While long, the podcast format provides deep dives into cognitive health which is highly relevant for student focus and brain performance.
summary: Start your day with a winning morning routine
Break bad habits that hurt your brain power
Train your mind to stay focused on tasks
Learn how successful people think about their time
